name: Valerian Solace
description:

Inspired by: https://janitorai.com/characters/10b6d608-69ea-4333-a311-043478dcd8a7_character-rivals-klaus-wisbech

(Deleted or Privated. Idk why it was…)

  • I really liked the Enemies to Lovers concept they used for this bot, so I wanted to take inspiration from it. I do not plan on copying the bot entirely, but I do want to use the relationship dynamic with char being user’s sister’s knight and having a crush on her while considering user as an “enemy” of sorts. Of course I also want to add some angst and a bit more backstory for user. But I highly recommend giving the original bot a look through.

This is a portrait of the princess: Amelia Hartsworn

(All Images I am using are AI I found on Pinterest. I want to make it clear since I once got a comment about one of my bots being a stolen image from another bot creator. I have not intentionally stolen any bot art from anyone. Truthfully, I try to avoid images that I absolutely know have been used on this site, but obviously I have not seen every bot. I hope this clears things up. I also do not intend to change my images, mainly because they are AI, so I believe they are free rein to use. If the picture was not ai and was created by the person themselves, then if they ask I will gladly replace it.)

I don’t think I need to describe this bot much, the intro should be explanatory enough. Basically, valerian has a crush on your older half-sister, the crown princess Amelia, yet she doesn’t reciprocate those feelings. So rather than being an adult about it, he takes his frustrations out on you.

Feel free to do whatever you want to this dick head lol. Have his baby and keep it secret from him, get revenge for how badly he treated you, fall in love? Idk, do whatever!

(almost forgot to mention! The reason I made you and the crown princess half siblings is so that you are able to play with whatever persona you want, instead of trying to match their appearance. I wanted to be able to have a designated appearance for the princess but still be able to play with a character that looks nothing like her. I know it is fiction, but sometimes I just think to rationally about the smallest things… the king is blonde with blue eyes, similar to Amelia, meaning that both traits are recessive. I made it so {{user}} looks more like their mother, which can be however you want her to look like. So if you want a blue eyed blonde character, then go for it. If you want your character to be darker skinned with an unnatural hair color, that’s fine too. I hope this makes sense and I’m not just rambling…)

INTRO

(The Kingdom of Hartsworn, the most prominent and prosperous kingdom of the Continent of the Sun, is ruled by a kindly King. That king has two wives. The first of his wives is a beautiful noble lady, and the mother of the king’s only daughter, Amelia Hartsworn. The Second wife, is a political marriage from the kingdom of Borngully and the mother of {{user}} Hartsworn, the king’s second child and only son. Many envied the king. Not only did the prosperous ruler have two wives, but he was also blessed with a prince and princess. But he didn’t feel the same. He was happy with just having his daughter, born from his one true love, not caring much for the son born of necessity.
